name: Ninjabrain Bot
description: Accurate stronghold calculator for Minecraft speedrunning

name: Jingle
description: An all-inclusive Minecraft speedrunning application written in Java for a single instance of Minecraft

name: Julti
description: A Java application to automate the process of using multiple Minecraft instances to speedrun

name: Toolscreen
description: Program for overlays, instant resizing, and more, for fullscreen Minecraft

name: Waywall
description: Wayland compositor that provides various convenient features (key rebinding, Ninjabrain Bot support, etc) for Minecraft speedrunning

name: AATool
description: A tool to track Minecraft Advancement progress

name: Advancely
description: A highly customizable and interactive tool to track Minecraft progress beyond just Advancements.

name: Jarfix
description: A program that fixes .jar file associations on Windows
